Stat Cards

KPI and metric display cards — the dashboard's heartbeat.

Standard Stats

Extracted from the Monarch dashboard — icon, large number, and label. The grid of these creates the KPI overview bar.

Stat Card Row
433 Total Accounts
$144.8M Pipeline Value
81 Avg Health
20 Active Agents
$3.01M Inference Tax Saved

With Trend

Stat Cards with Trends
Revenue 12.5%
$2.4M

vs $2.1M last quarter

Win Rate 3.2%
34%

vs 37% last quarter

Avg Deal Size —
$185K

No change from last quarter

Usage Guidelines

• Stat cards work best in a horizontal row — 3-5 cards across

• Icon color should match the metric's semantic category

• Numbers should be formatted for readability — $144.8M not $144,825,520

• Labels are uppercase, widest tracking, xs size — subtle but scannable

• Trend indicators: green up arrow = good, red down arrow = concern, dash = flat
